summary: Phase 2 (Collectors) complete. All 10 tasks executed: violation ID hashing utility, 7 collectors (circular-deps, layer-violations, complexity, coupling, forbidden-imports, module-size, dep-depth), registry with runAll(), and barrel exports. 72 architecture tests pass. Build and typecheck clean.
learnings: LanguageParser stubs need extensions and extractExports properties for DTS build to pass
Unused interface params require underscore prefix for strict TypeScript noUnusedLocals
Pure function mocking pattern with vi.mock hoisting works cleanly for collector tests
concerns: CircularDepsCollector and LayerViolationCollector currently use a stub parser — real parser wiring will come in Phase 4 (config schema)
LayerViolationCollector and ForbiddenImportCollector both call validateDependencies with empty layers — real layer config wiring deferred to Phase 4
ModuleSizeCollector and DepDepthCollector scan the filesystem directly — they skip test files and node_modules but may need additional exclusion patterns for large projects
